notes: Settings gains a Reset progress card, next to Backup on purpose. Pick a course, see exactly what would be erased, and confirm past a warning; the wipe is all-or-nothing and cannot be undone. Afterwards the app takes you to the Today page of the course you have the most progress on, or a fresh Lesson 1 if that was your only one, and the reset course offers the placement test again like a new language.
